data.biography:
Cory Michael Smith (born November 14, 1986) is an American actor and producer. He appeared in 2013 in Breakfast at Tiffany's on Broadway, which starred Emilia Clarke. Smith is most well-known for his role as The Riddler in the Fox series Gotham (2014–2019). He has appeared in several of Todd Haynes's films, including Carol(2015), Wonderstruck (2017), and May December (2023). Additional film roles include 1985 and First Man (both 2018), and Saturday Night (2024). The visual likeness of the character "Tanner" of the game Scrutinized is based on him.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Cory Michael Smith, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Cory Michael Smith

Anna Kashfi (born September 30, 1934) is a former film actress, who had a brief Hollywood career in the 1950s and is best known for having been married to Marlon Brando.

data.biography: Anna Kashfi, nascuda Joan O'Callaghan (Chakradharpur, Índia, 30 de setembre de 1934 - Woodland, Washington, 16 d’agost de 2015), va ser una actriu de cinema britànica que va tenir una breu carrera a Hollywood a la dècada de 1950, però va ser més coneguda pel seu tumultuós matrimoni amb l'estrella de cinema Marlon Brando i les controvèrsies al voltant del seu fill.

data.biography: 金弦，出生于北京。蒙古族、满族、回族、维吾尔族混血。精通中、英、法、德、西班牙语多种语言；精通小提琴和钢琴；精通绘画。2016年又开始练习跆拳道。 曾用圈名：妖精の飞羽、蓝逸、左边向北等。 经历 2007年5月，加入剪刀广播剧团。 2008年，毕业于多伦多大学。 2013年，在5sing创建了账号。 2016年，发行首张个人原创专辑《弦外之音》 2017年，加入729声工场。
data.name: 金弦

last_episode_to_air.name: Tôi đến, tôi thấy, tôi ở Venice
last_episode_to_air.overview: Giữa cảnh hỗn loạn "sống còn" của Tuần lễ Thời trang Venice, Emily chật vật lội ngược dòng để ghi dấu ấn. Ở Paris, công ty cũng đang gặp sóng gió.

data.name: Emily ở Paris
data.overview: Đam mê mới. Thời trang mới. Emily mới? Một chuyên gia tiếp thị người Mỹ can trường tự do trải nghiệm cuộc sống và tình yêu sau khi có được công việc mơ ước ở Paris.

seasons.name: Mùa 1
seasons.overview: Sau khi có được công việc mơ ước tại Paris, giám đốc tiếp thị ở Chicago – Emily Cooper – đón nhận cuộc sống mới đầy phiêu lưu và xoay xở với công việc, bạn bè, tình yêu.

seasons.name: Mùa 2
seasons.overview: Vui hơn. Thời trang hơn. Nhiều phốt hơn. Khi Emily ngày càng vững chắc ở Paris, hậu quả từ một đêm nồng cháy có thể đẩy cô vào rắc rối.

seasons.name: Mùa 3
seasons.overview: Một năm sau khi chuyển tới Paris để theo đuổi công việc mơ ước, Emily đứng trước ngã rẽ sự nghiệp và tình cảm, buộc cô phải quyết định đích đến cho tương lai của mình.

data.tagline: Cô ấy đã trở lại trong tình yêu và đang đến nhanh.

data.biography: Qin Hao (Chinese name: Chinese: 秦昊; pinyin: Qín Hào, born 19 May 1979) is a Chinese actor. He is known for starring in the 2009 film "Spring Fever", for which he was nominated for Best Actor at the Golden Horse Awards.
data.name: Qin Hao

data.biography:
秦昊，1978年5月19日出生于沈阳，中国内地男演员，2000年毕业于中央戏剧学院表演系。

2004年，主演文艺片《青红》，并随剧组首次赴戛纳。2009年，主演的文艺片《春风沉醉的夜晚》，获第62届戛纳电影节最佳编剧奖。2010年，主演文艺片《日照重庆》。2011年，参与拍摄由张艺谋执导故事片《金陵十三钗》。2012年，主演中日合拍电影《初到东京》 。2014年，主演的文艺片《推拿》在柏林首映，秦昊凭借该片获得首届“金羊奖”澳门国际电影节“金羊奖”最佳男主角。2016年，主演的喜剧片《火锅英雄》上映。

2017年，出演陈凯歌执导玄幻电影《妖猫传》；同年，主演社会派推理超级网剧《无证之罪》  ，并加盟现代探险题材电视剧《沙海》。2018年，主演的文艺片《你好，之华》上映 。2019年4月，主演的电影《风中有朵雨做的云》上映，秦昊演唱电影主题曲《一场游戏一场梦》；同年，出演军旅题材电视剧《尉官正年轻》 。
data.name: 秦昊

data.biography:
秦昊，1978 年 5 月 19 日出生於瀋陽，中國內地男演員，2000 年畢業於中央戲劇學院表演系。

2004 年，主演文藝片《青紅》，並隨劇組首次赴戛納。2009 年，主演的文藝片《春風沉醉的夜晚》，獲第 62 屆戛納電影節最佳編劇獎。2010 年，主演文藝片《日照重慶》。2011 年，參與拍攝由張藝謀執導故事片《金陵十三釵》。2012 年，主演中日合拍電影《初到東京》 。2014 年，主演的文藝片《推拿》在柏林首映，秦昊憑藉該片獲得首屆“金羊獎”澳門國際電影節“金羊獎”最佳男主角。2016 年，主演的喜劇片《火鍋英雄》上映。

2017 年，出演陳凱歌執導玄幻電影《妖貓傳》；同年，主演社會派推理超級網劇《無證之罪》 ，並加盟現代探險題材電視劇《沙海》。2018 年，主演的文藝片《你好，之華》上映 。2019 年 4 月，主演的電影《風中有朵雨做的雲》上映，秦昊演唱電影主題曲《一場遊戲一場夢》；同年，出演軍旅題材電視劇《尉官正年輕》 。
data.name: 秦昊

data.biography:
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

He was born in Pavlovsky Posad near Moscow. His mother was a kindergarten teacher and his father an engineer in the local textile factory. Vyacheslav dreamed of acting but his parents envisioned a different career, and during the war he worked in a munitions factory. After employment as a metal worker, he began [training for an] acting career in 1945 by entering, not without difficulty, the Actors’ Faculty of VGIK. After graduating VGIK with honours in 1950, he began his acting career on stage of Theatre Studio of Film Actor, where he worked for six years. In 1948 he married Nonna Mordyukova, a popular actress at the time (the couple had one son, Vladimir, also an actor who died in 1990). The marriage was dissolved in 1963. Later Tikhonov married a second time to Tamara Ivanovna Tikhonova and had one child with her, Anna Tikhonova (also an actor) in 1969. He died on 4 December 2009 in Moscow, Russia. Russian President Dmitry Medvedev has expressed his condolences to Tikhonov's family.
data.name: Vyacheslav Tikhonov

data.biography:
Народный артист СССР (1974). Герой Социалистического Труда (1982).

После начала Великой Отечественной войны Вячеслав Тихонов был принят в ремесленное училище, работал токарем по металлу. В 1945 году забрал документы из МАМИ, решив стать актером, несмотря на несогласие родителей. Поступить по конкурсу во Всесоюзный государственный институт кинематографии Вячеслав Тихонов не смог, однако был принят на испытательный семестр. По его итогам зачислен на актерский факультет в мастерскую Бориса Бибикова и Ольги Пыжовой. Окончил ВГИК с отличием в 1950 году.  Дебютной для него стала роль Владимира Осьмухина в драме «Молодая гвардия» по роману Александра Фадеева (1948, режиссер Сергей Герасимов).

В числе наиболее известных киноработ Вячеслава Тихонова: тракторист Матвей Морозов в мелодраме «Дело было в Пенькове» по повести Сергея Антонова (1957, Станислав Ростоцкий), Василий Панин в приключенческом фильме «Мичман Панин» (1960, Михаил Швейцер), учитель истории Илья Семенович Мельников в драме «Доживем до понедельника» (1968, Станислав Ростоцкий), Николай Стрельцов в военном фильме «Они сражались за Родину» по роману Михаила Шолохова (1975, Сергей Бондарчук), писатель Иван Иванович в фильме «Белый Бим Черное Ухо» по повести Гавриила Троепольского (1976, Станислав Ростоцкий), генерал КГБ Константин Константинов в политическом детективе «ТАСС уполномочен заявить…» по мотивам произведения Юлиана Семенова (1984, Владимир Фокин) и др.
data.name: Вячеслав Тихонов

data.biography:
Vjacseszlav Vasziljevics Tyihonov  orosz színész.

Egyik leghíresebb szerepét A tavasz tizenhét pillanata című 12 részes orosz tévéfilmsorozatban játszotta. Tyihonov Makszim Makszimovics Iszajev ezredest, a zseniális orosz kémet alakította, aki Max Otto von Stirlitz néven férkőzött a náci vezetők közelébe.

Tyihonov 80. születésnapját egész Oroszországban ünnepelték: számos újságcikkben írtak róla, a televíziók vetítették filmjeit és a vele készült portréfilmeket.

Dean Ricky Goldblum is a South African born Stage, Screen and Voice Actor raised in the City of Gold, Johannesburg. Dean is known for playing the parts of Todd on the Hulu Original feature 'Darby and the Dead' (2023), Sean on the SAFTA Award winning Netflix / SABC 1 mini-series 'The Kingdom' (2021), as well as Jason on the SAFTA award winning Showmax TV Comedy, 'Tali's Joburg Diary' (2023). In 2024, Dean featured in South Africa's first Amazon Prime Original Feature Film and Television Drama, playing the parts of Francois in 'The Morning After' (2024) as well as the young Dovi Diamond in 'The Shakedown' (2024). After acting in principle roles in a number of plays and musicals during his secondary and tertiary school years, Dean went on to study Theatre and Performance (acting) at The University of Cape Town (2021). Some of Dean's roles on stage include Badvoc in Boudica (2019), Will Bloom in Big Fish: The Musical (2016), Danny Zuko in Grease (2014) & Tom Snout/Faerie in A Midsummer Night's Dream at Maynardville (2023). Starting his screen career at the age of 13 on the South African Broadcasting Corporation's (SABC) 'Little Stars' (2013), Dean went on to perform as a contestant on South Africa's Got Talent (2015) in which his musical performance was described by Etv as "melting the hearts [of] the young at heart across the country".
data.name: Dean Goldblum

data.biography: Omi Minami (born July 13, 1968) is a Japanese voice actress, essayist and columnist. She is mostly known for her work in anime and video game roles, with starring roles as Hyatt in Excel Saga, Ruri Hoshino in Martian Successor Nadesico, Majic in Orphen, as well as Takuro in Di Gi Charat and Fan Xinglou in The Asterisk War.
data.name: Omi Minami

data.biography: 南央美（日语：南 央美／みなみ おみ Minami Omi，1968年7月13日—）是日本女性声优、歌手，出身于东京都。所属事务所为ポマランチ，以前所属事务所为大泽事务所。代表作为《机动战舰》的星野琉璃。
data.name: 南央美

data.biography:
Omi Minami (南 央美, Minami Omi, nacida el 13 de julio de 1968) es una actriz de voz, ensayista y columnista japonesa de Tokio que está afiliada a PomaRancz.

Es conocida principalmente por su trabajo en papeles de anime y videojuegos, con papeles protagónicos como Hyatt en Excel Saga, Ruri Hoshino en Martian Successor Nadesico, Majic en Orphen, así como Takuro en Di Gi Charat y Fan Xinglou en The Asterisk War.
data.name: Omi Minami

data.biography: Carlos-Manuel Vesga is a Colombian actor known for his extensive work in Latin American TV and film, gaining recent international attention as Manousos in Apple TV's Pluribus (2025) and for roles in The Hijacking of Flight 601 (2024) and News of a Kidnapping (2022). Born in Bogotá on January 30, 1976, he initially studied architecture but pursued acting, training in New York at the Lee Strasberg Theatre and Film Institute, and has become a significant presence in South American productions like Pura Sangre and Amor Sincero.

Carlos-Manuel Vesga es un actor colombiano conocido por su extenso trabajo en televisión y cine latinoamericano, ganando recientemente atención internacional como Manousos en Pluribus de Apple TV (2025) y por sus papeles en The Hijacking of Flight 601 (2024) y News of a Kidnapping (2022). Nacido en Bogotá el 30 de enero de 1976, inicialmente estudió arquitectura pero se dedicó a la interpretación, formándose en Nueva York en el Lee Strasberg Theatre and Film Institute, y se ha convertido en una presencia significativa en producciones sudamericanas como Pura Sangre y Amor Sincero.
data.name: Carlos-Manuel Vesga
卡洛斯·曼努埃爾·威斯加
การ์โลส มานูเอล เบสกา
卡洛斯·曼努埃爾·威斯加

data.biography:
Carlos Manuel Vesga, 30 Ocak 1976 tarihinde Bogotá, Kolombiya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Eğitimli bir mimar olmasına rağmen, sanata olan ilgisi ve tutkusu onu oyunculuk kariyerine yönlendirmiştir. Oyunculuk yeteneklerini geliştirmek için New York'taki prestijli Lee Strasberg Tiyatro ve Film Enstitüsü'nde eğitim almıştır.

Kariyerine 2000'lerin başında "Pobre Pablo" gibi telenovela yapımlarıyla başlayan Vesga, Kolombiya televizyon dünyasında hızla tanınan bir yüz haline geldi. Çok yönlü bir oyuncu olarak hem sinema hem de televizyon projelerinde yer aldı. Kariyerindeki en dikkat çekici rollerinden biri, 2010 yapımı "Amor sincero" dizisinde canlandırdığı karakterdir. Bu performansı ona 2011 yılında Premios India Catalina'da "En İyi Erkek Oyuncu" ödülünü kazandırmıştır.

Vesga'nın filmografisi, Kolombiya'nın en önemli yapımlarından bazılarını içermektedir. "Pablo Escobar: El Patrón del Mal" (Kötülüğün Efendisi), "El cártel de los Sapos" (Kurbağaların Karteli) ve "Pura Sangre" gibi uluslararası alanda da ses getiren dizilerde önemli roller üstlenmiştir. Ayrıca "Corazones Blindados" (Zırhlı Kalpler) dizisindeki performansıyla da övgü toplamış ve ödüle aday gösterilmiştir.

Sinema tarafında "Roa" (2013) ve "Soñar no cuesta nada" (2006) gibi filmlerde rol alan Vesga, son yıllarda dijital platformlarda yayınlanan projelerle uluslararası izleyici kitlesini genişletmiştir. Amazon Prime Video yapımı "Noticia de un Secuestro" (Bir Kaçırılma Haberi) ve Netflix'in popüler dizisi "El Sequestro do Voo 601" (601 Uçağı Kaçırılma Olayı) (2024) gibi projelerde yer alarak başarısını sürdürmektedir.

Carlos-Manuel Vesga ist ein kolumbianischer Schauspieler, der für seine umfangreiche Arbeit im lateinamerikanischen Fernsehen und Film bekannt ist. In jüngerer Zeit erlangte er internationale Aufmerksamkeit durch seine Rolle als Manousos in Pluribus (Apple TV, 2025) sowie durch Auftritte in Die Entführung von Flug 601 (2024) und Nachrichten von einer Entführung (2022).

Er wurde am 30. Januar 1976 in Bogotá geboren, studierte zunächst Architektur, entschied sich dann jedoch für die Schauspielerei und absolvierte seine Ausbildung am Lee Strasberg Theatre and Film Institute in New York. Heute gilt er als eine bedeutende Figur in südamerikanischen Produktionen wie Pura Sangre und Amor Sincero.
啜妮（Chuò Nī），大陆女演员，北京电影学院表演系2008级本科毕业。参演电视剧：《星光都市2》、《公元1921》、《孔子春秋》等；电影作品 ：《青田》 、《五个少林拳》等。
data.name: 啜妮

data.biography: Chuai Ni, nascida em uma família artística em Pequim, é uma atriz chinesa. Desde criança, ela foi nutrida pelo ambiente familiar e tem um grande interesse pela performance. Ela se formou no Departamento de Performance da Academia de Cinema de Pequim com mestrado. Em 2010, ingressou oficialmente no showbiz com sua participação na série de TV 'China 1921'.
Xuyết Ni là một nữ diễn viên điện ảnh và truyền hình đến từ Trung Quốc đại lục, cô tốt nghiệp khoa Diễn xuất của Học viện Điện ảnh Bắc Kinh và nhận bằng thạc sĩ của Học viện Điện ảnh Bắc Kinh.
data.name: Xuyết Ni
